sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Victory Capital Management Inc. Lowers Holdings in Ingersoll Rand Inc. $IR
feed.summary: Victory Capital Management Inc. decreased its stake in Ingersoll Rand Inc. by 32.6% in the third quarter, selling over 70,000 shares. feed.title: Earnings snapshot: Dollar General Q4 earnings beat estimates despite soft 2026 outlook
feed.summary: Dollar General reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings, with adjusted earnings per share of $1.83 and revenue of $9.86 billion, surpassing analyst estimates. Despite this beat, the company issued a soft outlook for fiscal year 2026, forecasting flat to 1% comparable sales growth and adjusted EPS between $6.30 and $6.80, which is below market expectations. The improved Q4 performance was attributed to a higher average ticket and increased customer traffic.

feed.title: Software Leaders Reject AI Industry Collapse Narrative | 2026 Analysis - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Oracle and Salesforce executives are pushing back against the narrative that AI will lead to a collapse in the software industry. Oracle's Mike Sicilia states the company is actively incorporating AI into new products and processes, while Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff highlights his company's transformation into an AI agent platform leveraging proprietary customer data. Both companies anticipate AI will drive future financial performance, utilizing their extensive enterprise data and adaptable cloud infrastructure to mitigate potential threats.

feed.title: Is Western Digital’s Fully Booked 2026 AI HDD Capacity Altering The Investment Case For WDC?
feed.summary: Western Digital's 2026 hard disk drive (HDD) capacity for AI data centers is already fully booked, signaling strong demand and a shift in its investment narrative. This follows a post-spinoff transformation, with management targeting aggressive earnings per share and gross margin goals backed by long-term hyperscaler contracts. While this confirms the AI storage story, investors are cautioned about customer concentration risk.

feed.title: Devon Coterra Merger Recasts Shale Scale Free Cash Flow And Returns
feed.summary: Devon Energy has completed its merger with Coterra Energy, establishing a larger U.S. shale producer aimed at realizing substantial pre-tax synergies and increasing shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks. The combined entity emphasizes opportunities from LNG-linked pipeline capacity and exposure to oil and natural gas pricing fluctuations due to global geopolitical tensions. Investors should monitor the integration's effectiveness, cost management, capital allocation, and the realization of targeted synergies and free cash flow.

feed.title: Chevron (CVX) and Shell Near Major Oil Deals in Venezuela

While these deals could offer significant growth opportunities, investors are advised to consider Chevron's valuation metrics and sector-specific risks.

feed.title: State Street selected by LME Clear
feed.summary: State Street Corporation has been chosen by LME Clear Limited to serve as its cash investment agent, managing the central counterparty's cash reinvestment activities. The partnership aims to enhance LME Clear's portfolio liquidity management and includes a global agency repo service. Both companies plan to integrate this service with other solutions, such as executing repo transactions via sponsored member and peer-to-peer models, to ensure the safety and liquidity of members' cash.

feed.title: Consolidated Edison 2026 Credit Agreement: Key Terms, Definitions, and Lender Commitments
feed.summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. has secured a new $3.5 billion revolving credit agreement with a syndicate of banks, including Bank of America, to provide significant liquidity and financial flexibility for general corporate purposes, working capital, and capital expenditures. The agreement, involving Con Edison, CECONY, and O&R, includes key financial covenants such as a consolidated debt to total capital ratio not exceeding 0.65 to 1, and outlines detailed maturity, default events, and reporting requirements. This move is seen as a positive development, strengthening the company's balance sheet and supporting its ongoing investments in infrastructure and utilities.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin vs. L3Harris: Which Defense Giant Belongs in Your Portfolio?
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) and L3Harris Technologies (LHX) both reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, capitalizing on increased U.S. defense spending. Lockheed Martin saw its Missiles & Fire Control segment rebound to profit and a significant jump in F-35 deliveries, while L3Harris achieved record orders and consistent organic revenue growth. Despite both companies performing well, Lockheed Martin appears to be a more attractive investment due to its lower forward P/E ratio and strong projected segment operating profit growth for 2026.

feed.title: Dollar General’s Sales Outlook Disappoints After Stock’s Big Run
feed.summary: Dollar General's stock fell after the company's sales outlook for the fiscal year came in line with analyst projections, rather than exceeding them, as had often been the case. The retailer expects comparable sales to increase by 2.2% to 2.7%, while analysts had predicted 2.45%. Despite the sales forecast, the earnings per share range provided by the company was slightly above projections.

feed.title: NextEra (NEE) anticipates adding up to 30 gigawatts of power for data centers by 2035
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) plans to add up to 30 gigawatts of new power generation by 2035 to meet the surging demand from data centers. This move highlights the growing energy consumption of the tech sector and NextEra's strategy to capitalize on this trend through significant infrastructure expansion. The ambitious target underscores the company's commitment to supporting the digital economy's energy requirements.
